_comment: americomputadora — hook melody. D major, 112 BPM. The three vocal samples (whole-word clips, not per-syllable) get autotuned to these target MIDI notes at render time. The hook phrase spans TWO bars (8 beats) so the words can actually speak — 'americaaaaa cawwwmputer dora!': america sings a full bar (4 beats) BEFORE computer enters, computer 2 beats, dora 2 beats as the exclamation point with ring-out.

hook._variant_note: ballad melody set (2026-06-09) — variants rotate per hook rep; ordered so the gentle contours open the song and the climax contour arrives as the percussion ramp peaks. bach contours kept from the bachiamatrixian pass.

variants.label: rise-rest
variants.tone: ballad opener — D4→A4, resting on the third

variants.label: bach-circle
variants.tone: bachiamatrixian — B4→A4→F#4, lament step-down onto the third

variants.label: bach-arc
variants.tone: bachiamatrixian — F#4→A4→D5, rising tonic arpeggio, fanfare resolution

variants.label: bach-fall
variants.tone: bachiamatrixian — D5→B4→D4, falling sixth through the vi, lands tonic

bed._progression_note: I — V — vi — IV. canonical bubblegum loop (Sugar Sugar / Baby One More Time pre-chorus / countless others). 8 bars total, repeats.
